idea: An orchestration layer for ecommerce clients that integrates with Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) to streamline data management, identity verification, and payment processing. With the introduction of Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP), ecommerce retailers face the challenge of integrating and orchestrating their data with this new standard. Retailers struggle with identity and payment solutions, as well as creating effective feedback loops for reporting. Current workarounds involve piecemeal solutions that lack cohesion and efficiency, leading to increased operational costs and missed opportunities for optimization. The platform would act as an orchestration layer providing: an intent layer/parser that interprets customer intents from various data inputs, seamless identity verification and payment processing integration, and comprehensive feedback loop and reporting tools for analytics.
